$comment: Docs-local version manifest for docs.nexart.io. This file is manually synchronized. It is NOT dynamically imported from nexart.io or npm at build time. Each entry records its authoritative upstream source and the date it was last reconciled. To update: check each 'source' URL, update the 'value', bump 'verifiedAt', and open a docs PR. Do NOT introduce values not reflected upstream.
syncInstructions: For each entry, fetch the URL in 'source', compare 'value', update 'value' and 'verifiedAt' if it drifted. Package versions can also be reconciled via 'npm view <pkg> version'. Protocol/canonicalization/CER schema/bundle type identifiers are governed by the NexArt Protocol Spec and MUST match the deployed node build.

supportedProtocolVersions.source: NexArt Protocol Specification (governed by NexArt engineering; mirrored in the node build). Reconcile against the deployed node's /v1/protocol/versions when available.

defaultProtocolVersion.source: NexArt Protocol Specification (fallback when the request omits protocolVersion).

1.2.0.source: NexArt Protocol Specification, section: Canonicalization Profiles.

1.3.0.source: RFC 8785 (JCS); bound to protocolVersion 1.3.0 by the NexArt Protocol Specification.

1.3.1.source: RFC 8785 (JCS); bound to protocolVersion 1.3.1 by the NexArt Protocol Specification.

cerSchemaVersion.source: CER bundle schema declared in @nexart/ai-execution runtime exports; reconcile against the SDK build.

deployedNodeVersion.source: Attestation node build metadata (returned in /v1/health or /v1/protocol/versions). Not tracked in docs at this time; consult the operations team for the deployed value.

deployedVerifierVersion.source: verify.nexart.io deployment metadata. Not tracked in docs at this time; consult the operations team for the deployed value.
